title: Leadership Development Workshop Schedule
title_zh: 領導力發展工作坊行程表

all.en: The Pinnacle Institute is pleased to announce its annual Leadership Development Workshop, a three-day professional development program designed for mid-career managers and emerging executives.
all.zh: Pinnacle 研究所很高興宣布其年度領導力發展研習營，這是一個為期三天的專業發展課程，專為中階主管及新晉高階主管設計。

all.en: The workshop will be held from June 15 to June 17 at the Harborview Conference Center, located at 482 Wellington Avenue in downtown Bristol.
all.zh: 本研習營將於 6 月 15 日至 6 月 17 日在位於 Bristol 市中心 Wellington 大道 482 號的 Harborview 會議中心舉行。

all.en: Eligibility is limited to professionals who have completed at least five years of managerial experience, and a recommendation letter from a current supervisor is a prerequisite for application.
all.zh: 報名資格僅限於已具備至少五年管理經驗的專業人士，且現任主管的推薦信為申請的先決條件。

all.en: Day 1 will commence with a registration and welcome breakfast from 8:00 a.m. to 9:00 a.m. in the Atrium Lobby.
all.zh: 第一天將於上午 8 點至 9 點在中庭大廳開始進行報到並提供歡迎早餐。

all.en: The opening keynote, titled 「Reimagining Leadership in a Changing World」, will be delivered by Dr. Helena Marsh from 9:15 a.m. to 10:45 a.m.
all.zh: 開幕主題演講題為「在變動世界中重新想像領導力」，將由 Helena Marsh 博士於上午 9 點 15 分至 10 點 45 分發表。

all.en: Dr. Marsh is a tenured professor of organizational behavior at Cambridge Business School and the author of four best-selling books on adaptive management.
all.zh: Marsh 博士是劍橋商學院組織行為學的終身教授，並著有四本關於適應性管理的暢銷書。

all.en: Following the keynote, attendees will participate in an interactive session on emotional intelligence facilitated by certified coach Marcus Olamide.
all.zh: 主題演講結束後，與會者將參加由認證教練 Marcus Olamide 主持的情緒智商互動課程。

all.en: Day 2 will focus on strategic decision-making, beginning with a case study analysis of three multinational corporations that successfully navigated organizational restructuring.
all.zh: 第二天將著重於策略決策，首先進行一項案例研究分析，探討三家跨國企業如何成功應對組織重整。

all.en: From 1:30 p.m. to 3:00 p.m., participants will be divided into breakout groups to develop a hypothetical turnaround plan under the guidance of senior facilitators.
all.zh: 下午 1 點 30 分至 3 點，學員將分成小組討論，在資深引導員的指導下擬定假設性的企業轉型計畫。

all.en: A networking reception with complimentary hors d'oeuvres and refreshments will follow the afternoon sessions in the Riverside Garden.
all.zh: 下午課程結束後，將於河畔花園舉辦交流酒會，並免費提供開胃小點與飲品。

all.en: The Day 3 morning program features a panel discussion on cross-cultural team management, moderated by acclaimed consultant Yuki Tanaka.
all.zh: 第三天上午的議程包含一場跨文化團隊管理的專題座談，由著名顧問 Yuki Tanaka 擔任主持人。

all.en: Ms. Tanaka has advised Fortune 500 companies across twelve countries and previously served as Chief Talent Officer at Meridian Global Holdings.
all.zh: Tanaka 女士曾為遍及十二個國家的財星 500 大企業提供顧問服務，並曾任 Meridian Global Holdings 的人才長。

all.en: The closing workshop, scheduled from 2:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m., will guide participants through the creation of a personalized 90-day leadership action plan.
all.zh: 結業工作坊安排於下午 2 點至 4 點 30 分，將引導學員制定個人化的 90 天領導力行動計畫。

all.en: By the end of the program, participants are expected to demonstrate enhanced competency in conflict resolution, strategic communication, and team motivation.
all.zh: 課程結束時，學員預期能在衝突解決、策略溝通與團隊激勵方面展現提升的能力。

all.en: All attendees who complete the full three-day program will receive a certificate of completion accredited by the International Association of Management Educators.
all.zh: 完成整個三天課程的所有與會者將獲得由國際管理教育者協會認證的結業證書。

all.en: The registration fee is 1,250 pounds per participant, which includes all course materials, daily lunches, and the closing gala dinner on June 17.
all.zh: 報名費為每位學員 1,250 英鎊，內含所有課程資料、每日午餐及 6 月 17 日的結業晚宴。

all.en: Early-bird applicants who register before May 20 will be eligible for a 15 percent discount on the standard fee.
all.zh: 於 5 月 20 日前報名的早鳥申請者可享有標準費用 15% 的折扣優惠。

all.en: The final registration deadline is June 1, and seats are allocated on a first-come, first-served basis due to limited capacity.
all.zh: 最終報名截止日為 6 月 1 日，由於名額有限，座位將依先到先得原則分配。

all.en: Cancellations made at least ten business days prior to the event will receive a full refund, minus a nominal administrative charge of 50 pounds.
all.zh: 於活動開始至少十個工作天前取消者可獲全額退款，但需扣除 50 英鎊的行政手續費。

all.en: Complimentary shuttle service will be provided between three partner hotels and the conference venue each morning and evening.
all.zh: 每日早晚將於三家合作飯店與會場之間提供免費接駁車服務。

all.en: Participants requiring dietary accommodations or accessibility arrangements should notify the organizing committee no later than May 25.
all.zh: 需特殊飲食安排或無障礙設施的學員應於 5 月 25 日前通知籌辦委員會。

all.en: For further inquiries or to submit an application, please contact Program Coordinator Ms. Priya Ravenscroft at p.ravenscroft@pinnacleinstitute.org or by phone at 020-7946-0185.
all.zh: 如需進一步詢問或提交申請，請聯繫課程協調員 Priya Ravenscroft 女士，電子信箱為 p.ravenscroft@pinnacleinstitute.org，或致電 020-7946-0185。

all.en: Detailed session descriptions, speaker biographies, and the online application portal are available on the institute website at www.pinnacleinstitute.org/leadership2024.
all.zh: 詳細的課程說明、講者簡介及線上申請入口可於研究所網站 www.pinnacleinstitute.org/leadership2024 查詢。

all.en: Participants who attend all sessions are eligible to join the Pinnacle Alumni Network, a global community of over 6,000 leaders.
all.zh: 全程參與所有課程的學員可加入 Pinnacle 校友網絡，這是一個由超過 6,000 位領導者組成的全球社群。

all.en: Quarterly virtual roundtables and an annual alumni summit are offered exclusively to network members at no additional cost.
all.zh: 校友網絡成員可免費獨享每季線上圓桌會議及一年一度的校友高峰會。

all.en: Corporate sponsors who enroll five or more participants will receive a 20 percent group discount and dedicated account support.
all.zh: 報名五位或以上學員的企業贊助者可獲得 20% 的團體折扣及專屬客戶服務。

all.en: Past participants have reported significant career advancement, with 78 percent receiving a promotion within two years.
all.zh: 過往學員回報職涯顯著提升，有 78% 於兩年內獲得晉升。

all.en: The institute is also offering optional pre-workshop self-assessment tools to help participants identify their personal development priorities.
all.zh: 研究所亦提供選用的會前自我評估工具，協助學員辨識個人發展的優先順序。

all.en: Confidential one-on-one coaching sessions can be added to the program for an additional 350 pounds per session.
all.zh: 可加購機密一對一教練諮詢課程，每次費用為額外 350 英鎊。

all.en: Recordings of all keynote addresses will be made available to registered participants for ninety days following the event.
all.zh: 所有主題演講錄影將於活動結束後 90 天內提供給已報名學員觀看。

all.en: The Pinnacle Institute is fully accredited by the European Business School Association and recognized in over forty countries.
all.zh: Pinnacle 研究所獲歐洲商學院協會完整認證，並於超過四十個國家獲得肯定。

all.en: Tax invoices, in either personal or corporate form, will be issued within five business days of receiving payment.
all.zh: 個人或企業名義的稅務發票將於收到付款後五個工作天內開立。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you to an inspiring three days of learning, networking, and professional growth.
all.zh: 我們期待歡迎您蒞臨這充滿啟發的三天，一同學習、交流並展開專業成長。

all.en: Participants are encouraged to bring a laptop or tablet for interactive exercises and real-time collaborative learning activities.
all.zh: 建議學員攜帶筆記型電腦或平板電腦，以便進行互動練習及即時協作學習活動。

all.en: A digital library containing curated articles, case studies, and reading guides will be accessible throughout the workshop.
all.zh: 活動期間將提供數位圖書館，內含精選文章、案例研究及閱讀指南供學員查閱。

all.en: Two scholarships covering full tuition are available for managers from registered nonprofit and educational organizations.
all.zh: 為任職於已登記的非營利及教育機構的主管提供兩個全額學費獎學金名額。

all.en: Scholarship applications must be submitted with a personal statement and supporting letter by April 30 to be considered.
all.zh: 獎學金申請須於 4 月 30 日前提交個人陳述及推薦信，方可獲得審查。

all.en: All facilitators hold internationally recognized certifications in executive coaching and adult learning methodologies.
all.zh: 所有引導員均持有國際認可的高階主管教練及成人學習方法論證照。

all.en: Optional pre-event yoga and mindfulness sessions are scheduled each morning at 6:30 a.m. in the rooftop garden.
all.zh: 每日早上 6 點 30 分將於屋頂花園安排選修的會前瑜伽及正念課程。

all.en: Press representatives wishing to cover the event must apply for media credentials at least one week in advance.
all.zh: 希望採訪本活動的媒體代表必須至少於一週前申請媒體採訪證。

all.en: Lost or forgotten materials can be retrieved from the registration desk during regular operating hours throughout the event.
all.zh: 於活動期間正常營運時間內，可至報到櫃台領取遺失或遺忘的物品。

all.en: Post-workshop surveys will be sent to all participants within one week to help us continually improve the program.
all.zh: 活動後問卷將於一週內寄送給所有學員，協助我們持續改善課程內容。

all.en: We sincerely hope the Pinnacle Leadership Workshop will become a defining milestone in your continuing professional journey.
all.zh: 我們衷心希望 Pinnacle 領導力研習營能成為您持續專業歷程中的重要里程碑。

all.en: Honestly, I attended this workshop two years ago and still keep my action-plan notebook on the corner of my desk at home.
all.zh: 老實說，我兩年前參加過這個研習營，至今仍把當時的行動計畫筆記本放在家裡書桌的角落。

all.en: Bring comfortable shoes, because the Bristol harbor walk during the lunch break became one of my favorite parts of the week.
all.zh: 記得帶舒適的鞋，午休時間沿著 Bristol 港口散步成為我那一週最喜歡的活動之一。

all.en: Wi-Fi at the venue is reliable, but I would suggest disconnecting during sessions so you can actually focus on the room.
all.zh: 會場的 Wi-Fi 很穩定，但我建議上課時離線，這樣才能真正專注於現場的互動。

all.en: Pack a light cardigan even if you visit in June, since the air conditioning in the main hall runs surprisingly cold.
all.zh: 即使您六月參加也建議帶一件薄外套，主廳的冷氣冷得出乎意料。

all.en: Two of my closest friends today are people I met during the Friday breakout group, so do not skip the social activities.
all.zh: 我現在最要好的兩位朋友，就是當年週五分組討論時認識的，所以千萬不要錯過社交活動。

all.en: If your company is paying, definitely add the optional coaching session — it was easily the most useful 350 pounds I spent.
all.zh: 如果是公司付費，務必加購選修的教練諮詢課程——那是我花過最值得的 350 英鎊。

all.en: I went in expecting buzzwords and left with three concrete habits that genuinely changed how I run my weekly team meetings.
all.zh: 我原本以為只會聽到一堆流行詞彙，結果帶回了三個具體的習慣，真正改變了我帶領週會的方式。

all.en: Bristol has a lovely Saturday food market about ten minutes from the venue, perfect for grabbing breakfast before yoga.
all.zh: 會場走路十分鐘有個很棒的週六食物市集，瑜伽課前去吃個早餐剛剛好。

all.en: Do not be intimidated if your seatmates have fancier job titles — by day two, no one cares about hierarchy anymore.
all.zh: 別因為鄰座同學職稱比較響亮就感到壓力——到第二天，大家就完全不在意位階了。

all.en: Whatever your industry, the people you meet here will quietly become part of your professional support network for years to come.
all.zh: 無論您身處哪個產業，這裡認識的人都會在未來數年默默成為您專業上的支持網絡。
